---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Flag unclear, missing, or incorrect documentation
title: '[Docs] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What's the Issue?

- [ ] Missing documentation (something isn't covered)
- [ ] Unclear documentation (something is confusing or ambiguous)
- [ ] Incorrect documentation (something is wrong or outdated)

## Location

Which file or section is affected? (e.g., README.md — TLS Inspection Certificate section, `create-template` step 3)

## What's Missing or Confusing?

Describe the problem clearly.

## Suggested Improvement

If you have a suggested rewrite or addition, include it here. Even rough notes are helpful.

## Context

What were you trying to do when you ran into this? What environment were you working in?
